untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting MA line acting as resistance and capping subsequent rises, and comparing price levels against a vague threshold ('way above'). These require dynamic pivot/resistance detection and relative price positioning logic not available in the allowed indicator set. The condition 'MA line caps subsequent rises' cannot be expressed as a single bar comparison using allowed operators.
translation_notes: Translated core entry condition (price crosses below 20MA in downtrend) using sma_20. Conditions for MA resistance behavior and price 'way above' MA require multi-bar pattern recognition beyond allowed operators. Exit condition set to reversal above 20MA per rule 8 (AUTHOR_SILENT).
